name: After School Snacks
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread a spoonful of cranberry relish on turkey slices and roll up.
2. Place a slice of plum tomato and a small amount of reduced-fat cheese on a mini bagel; broil until the cheese melts.
3. Spread mashed refried beans on a flour tortilla, add salsa, and sprinkle with reduced-fat Monterey Jack cheese. Roll up and microwave until heated through.
4. Microwave a medium-sized potato until tender. Top with reduced-fat sour cream and salsa, or cooked broccoli and reduced-fat American cheese.
5. Fill reduced-fat refrigerator rolls with low-fat mozzarella and pizza sauce; bake until the filling is golden brown.
6. Lightly brush flour tortillas with vegetable oil. Sprinkle with cinnamon and sugar; briefly bake to warm.
7. Crush chocolate wafer cookies in a zip lock bag. Mix with reduced-fat whipped topping and spoon into ice cream cones.
8. Spread reduced-fat cream cheese on graham cracker squares, top with raisins and grated carrot.
9. Place marshmallow fluff on miniature rice cakes and add mini chocolate chips.
10. Layer reduced-fat prepared rice pudding and fresh berries in a parfait glass.
